description: Repositories discovered to hold concrete latent value, promoted into the ranked build-out tier.

ranked.thesis: Only deployed public web surface in the estate (FastAPI, v0.4.0, 122 tests, live on Render). Holds a machine-readable discovery surface (/api/manifest + Atom feeds + full-text search) that can become the estate-wide front door, plus a reusable production-hardened web scaffold (CSRF middleware, WebSocket RoomManager, rate limiting, data_export). Value is reach: the public face that makes the rest of the estate discoverable.
ranked.first_task: Add a cross-organ aggregation endpoint GET /api/estate (and a combined Atom feed) that fans out over sibling organ /api/manifest endpoints, reusing the existing ManifestOut model and feed plumbing, turning the ORGAN-VI portal into the estate's public machine-readable index.
